title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Titan Company

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Titan Company
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Titan Company in Ranchi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Titan Company:
Titan Company is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Company!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
